note: explore settled: gap is a missing STRUCTURAL edit-class classification, not gherkin-cli (which already reports addOnly:false when a frozen scenario is modified); raw git line-diff is what a context-line reassignment fools. Authored additive freeze-edit-class scenarios + README on frozen spec-gate.feature; mechanical pre-filters green.

judge-iteration: cold spec-judge FAILed (oracle+architect). The authored pre-filter invented a fail-closed outcome for a still-frozen narrowing, which contradicts the standing narrowing->Clearance model (frozen sibling scenario 'a narrowing edit unfreezes its file and fires Clearance' + lifecycle-model.md:169 + autonomy-rubric.md pre-grantable Clearance) and offered no path for CR pre-authorized Clearance. Reframing: the fix is that the edit-class CLASSIFICATION must be a per-scenario structural diff (not raw line-diff) so a narrowing is correctly detected and routed to the EXISTING Clearance floor (self-clears only if pre-authorized), never mis-self-cleared as additive. Re-mapping scenarios to the digest-classification + verb-freeze use cases, not a new pre-filter.
